creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
Created attachment 248256
Patch to update

This release includes several smaller fixes and improvements before
the next release will see some major changes.

We have fixed the "dump" command’s inability to deal with missing
directories, accept private key files labeled “EC PRIVATE KEY” for the
HTTP and RTR TLS configuration, and now log error output of the rsync
command immediately rather than collecting it and logging it all at
once, possibly overwhelming syslog.
